description: Cauldron: An efficient Constant Product Market Maker (CPMM) contract on Bitcoin Cash through micro-pools.
name: CatDex

covenant.description: A constant product market maker. Unspent Transaction Outputs (UTXO) threads hold tokens and Bitcoin Cash value, enabling anyone to swap tokens for bch provided the contract adheres to the constant product formula, K = x * y, where K is the constant value, and x and y represent the quantities of tokens and BCH, respectively.)
covenant.name: CatDex Micro Pool

key.description: The private key that controls this wallet.
key.name: Key

catdex_amm.name: CatDex Covenant
catdex_amm.script:
// It's a trade
// Verify it is the correct category ID.
OP_INPUTINDEX
OP_OUTPUTTOKENCATEGORY
OP_INPUTINDEX
OP_UTXOTOKENCATEGORY
OP_EQUALVERIFY

// Verify that this contract lives on on the output with
// the same input as this contract.
OP_INPUTINDEX
OP_OUTPUTBYTECODE
OP_INPUTINDEX
OP_UTXOBYTECODE
OP_EQUALVERIFY

// Calculate target K
OP_INPUTINDEX
OP_UTXOVALUE
OP_INPUTINDEX
OP_UTXOTOKENAMOUNT
OP_MUL
//  On stack: K

// Get effective output K when including the fee.
OP_INPUTINDEX
OP_OUTPUTVALUE

OP_INPUTINDEX
OP_OUTPUTTOKENAMOUNT
OP_MUL
// Verify that effective K > target K
OP_SWAP
OP_GREATERTHANOREQUAL
